# coherence module constants

# coherence public function / class signatures
compute_coherence_score(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Dict[str, Any]
format_coherence_report(result: Dict[str, Any]) -> List[str]
score_completeness(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Tuple[float, Dict[str, Any]]
score_consistency(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Tuple[float, Dict[str, Any]]
score_coverage(project_dir: pathlib.Path) -> Tuple[float, Dict[str, Any]]
score_efficiency(project_dir: pathlib.Path, *, data_dir: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> Tuple[float, Dict[str, Any]]
